compiled_state.title: Update REVIEW-WORKFLOW-HUGE.md fallback branch with MODEL_OVERRIDE and opus agent routing (cf76-7091 T3)
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Story
cf76-7091 — Opus fallback agents for large-refactor review path

## Testing Mode
GREEN — implements behavior verified by T1 tests

## Depends on
T1 (f787-d995) — tests must be RED first
T2 (cf24-fd2a) — agent files must exist first

## What
Update the fallback branch in `plugins/dso/docs/workflows/REVIEW-WORKFLOW-HUGE.md` to:

1. Emit `MODEL_OVERRIDE: opus` at the start of the fallback section
2. Map REVIEW_TIER to the appropriate opus-model agent:
   - `light` → `REVIEW_AGENT_OVERRIDE=dso:huge-diff-reviewer-light`
   - `standard` → `REVIEW_AGENT_OVERRIDE=dso:huge-diff-reviewer-standard`
   - `deep` → `REVIEW_AGENT_OVERRIDE=dso:code-reviewer-deep-arch` (already opus; no new file needed)
3. Set REVIEW_AGENT_OVERRIDE and dispatch inline per the REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md pattern

## Pattern to follow
Reference REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md for the existing dispatch pattern. The MODEL_OVERRIDE signal must
appear before the agent dispatch so the orchestrator can log it. The deep tier maps to the
existing `dso:code-reviewer-deep-arch` (already an opus agent) — no new file is created for it.

## Verification
After updating the file:
- `grep 'MODEL_OVERRIDE' plugins/dso/docs/workflows/REVIEW-WORKFLOW-HUGE.md` → exits 0
- `grep 'huge-diff-reviewer-light' plugins/dso/docs/workflows/REVIEW-WORKFLOW-HUGE.md` → exits 0
- `grep 'huge-diff-reviewer-standard' plugins/dso/docs/workflows/REVIEW-WORKFLOW-HUGE.md` → exits 0
- `grep 'code-reviewer-deep-arch' plugins/dso/docs/workflows/REVIEW-WORKFLOW-HUGE.md` → exits 0
- T1 tests `test_huge_fallback_emits_model_override`, `test_huge_fallback_references_light_agent`,
  `test_huge_fallback_references_standard_agent`, `test_huge_fallback_references_deep_arch_agent` → all PASS
